description: Large family. Succulent Euphorbias mimic cacti in form. All produce toxic milky latex. E. milii (Crown of Thorns / Kranton) is one of India's most common flowering succulents.
meta_description: Succulent Euphorbia species list with Indian common names and conservation status.
meta_keywords: Euphorbia, Crown of Thorns, Kranton, Nagphani, spurge, succulent

genera.description: 2000+ species. Succulent species mimic cacti. E. milii (Kranton/Crown of Thorns) and E. tirucalli (Sehund) are widely grown in India.
